/usr/bin/cc   -DLSQUIC_DEBUG_NEXT_ADV_TICK=1 -DLSQUIC_CONN_STATS=1 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -fno-omit-frame-pointer -O0 -g3  -I/Users/divya/lsquic/lsquic/boringssl/include -DHAVE_BORINGSSL -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/md5_client.dir/md5_client.c.o CMakeFiles/md5_client.dir/prog.c.o CMakeFiles/md5_client.dir/test_common.c.o CMakeFiles/md5_client.dir/test_cert.c.o -o md5_client   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib ../src/liblsquic/liblsquic.a /Users/divya/lsquic/lsquic/boringssl/build-mac/libssl.a /Users/divya/lsquic/lsquic/boringssl/build-mac/libcrypto.a -lz -lstdc++ -lpthread -lm /opt/homebrew/lib/libevent.a
